base_prompt: Write in a clear, professional academic tone. Use only the provided context. Do not invent facts. Keep the output structured and concise. testing

sections.title: Introduction
sections.instruction: Introduce the topic and explain its background.

sections.title: Methodology
sections.instruction: Explain the method or workflow from the documents.

subsections.title: Data Sources
subsections.instruction: Describe the source documents or datasets if mentioned.
